description:
## Question

Implement the locked design and land it.

- Create darwin-modules/features/voice.nix + wire in features/default.nix; add `voice` to the feature seam and to all Macs (per ticket 2).
- Add the superwhisper cask; port the hooks, toggle skill, and statusline indicator per tickets 3/4/5.
- git add new files (flakes only see tracked files), build (home-test / system-test), activate, verify on a Mac.
- Handle/notualize TCC (mic + accessibility) grants — likely a manual note per the map's Not-yet-specified.

This is the destination endpoint: execution carried into the map.

comments.text:
BUILT + VALIDATED (activation handed off to user per their choice). jj change d35b5d78.

CHANGES (6 files):
- NEW darwin-modules/features/voice.nix — options.features.voice.enable; mkIf cfg.enable { homebrew.casks=[superwhisper]; user.programs.claude-code.settings.hooks (all 5 events -> claude-hook); user.home.file '.claude/skills/superwhisper/SKILL.md'.source; user.programs.claudeStatusline.segments (SW indicator, priority 90) }.
- NEW home-modules/claude-statusline.nix — composable statusline: options.programs.claudeStatusline.{enable,segments}; generator writeShellApplication joins segments by ' · ' in priority order; base model+ctx segment (priority 10); sets programs.claude-code.settings.statusLine.command.
- home-modules/settings/programs/claude-code.nix — removed the old statusline let-binding + statusLine setting (moved into claude-statusline.nix).
- home-modules/default.nix — import ./claude-statusline.nix (always-loaded, declares option).
- darwin-modules/features/default.nix — import ./voice.nix + voice.enable = machine.features.voice.
- modules/hosts.nix — 'voice' added to nebula.features + spectre + ash.
(SKILL.md already committed in nix-4t3.4.)

VALIDATION on ash: nix build .#darwinConfigurations.ash.system succeeded (shellcheck passed on the generator). features.voice.enable=true; superwhisper cask present in homebrew.casks; settings.json hooks = all 5 SuperWhisper events + WorktreeCreate/Remove merged (freeform-json merge confirmed). Statusline live run: 'Opus 4.8 · 45k/200k ctx (22%) · ✓ superwhisper'; touching /tmp/superwhisper-agent/disabled-<md5(cwd)> flips it to '✗ superwhisper' — gating confirmed, hashing .workspace.current_dir matches the skill/binary convention.

ACTIVATION (user-driven, pending):
- User-space (no sudo): home-manager switch --flake .#ash-yann  (hooks + /superwhisper skill + statusline). Functional immediately since superwhisper.app is already installed.
- Full darwin (sudo): darwin-rebuild switch --flake .#ash  — brings the superwhisper cask under declarative management (brew bundle adopts the already-installed app).

TCC (manual, from map Not-yet-specified): grant SuperWhisper.app Microphone + Accessibility in System Settings > Privacy & Security. Not Nix-configurable.

title: Build and activate the voice integration
